infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Sage reads contacts on-device to look up people you ask about. Nothing leaves your phone.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Sage creates and reads calendar events you ask it to manage.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Sage creates reminders you ask it to set.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Sage listens for the wake word and transcribes speech on-device.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Sage transcribes your speech locally with Whisper.cpp.
